series_metadata.series_description: Contains current postings and previously removed postings on the Department of Public Safety''s website. Postings include list of approved IID Licensees (contact information and certified devices), IID installation locations, and any other postings/materials as needed.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain current, plus 6 months following date of removal. Records are retained on network drives in the Ohio Traffic Safety Office., Electronic: Delete
